title: Alex's Exotic Food
description: Add a spicy kick to your meals, brew refreshing beverages, or bake sweet treats. All textures are pixelated by myself :)
body:
## About![Apple Juice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9CqVayvc/images/8eab9e791759330c7343a38914edfb7b96a59342.png) ![Chili Plant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9CqVayvc/images/14c2753a6ddf163e121cdcd2cf5ab65ba63d639f.png)![Candy Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9CqVayvc/images/9db2d9c50a1592789322f8b08a665361bc81a61f.png)![Carrot Juice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9CqVayvc/images/877f969cfe414b1e4fcdf97ec0a2f708ef186dba.png)![Lemon Grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9CqVayvc/images/44abb1f5634afad7bb0fe59366cce079b79b77d6.png)![Spicy Chicken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9CqVayvc/images/a8ede3dce5ce485c7aad61916cf25e73e9362b79.png)![Sweet Berry Juice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9CqVayvc/images/edd9e68e31c750afddb34ab6695e11fb959e1474.png)![Brownie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9CqVayvc/images/11047b20068c5c9e4a762faa78a66feba45169fe.png)![Rabbit Broth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9CqVayvc/images/7f20ca794d98d71af3d91eb783595c0db6ed86b5.png)![Melon Juice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9CqVayvc/images/67ee446781cb3e0c3c3f064716bc8bb3833b9d6a.png)

Expands the culinary experience in the game by introducing a diverse range of new foods, drinks, and plants that players can discover, grow, and consume. This mod enhances gameplay by offering unique and exotic items, perfect for players who enjoy farming and cooking.



| New Meals               |   
|---------------------|   
| Bone Broth          |   
| Chicken Broth       |  
| Pumpkin Soup        | 
| Spicy Chicken       |
| Chili-Butter Bread  |
| Corn Bread          |
| Spicy Chicken       |
| Rabbit Broth       |
| Grilled Corn       |
| Buttered Corn       |
| Chili Butter Corn       |

| New Snacks & Drinks            |   
|---------------------|   
| Sweet Berry  Cookie          |   
| Chocolate Fudge Brownie       |  
| Candy Apple        | 
| Apple Juice      |
| Sweet Berry Juice      |
| Carrot Juice      |
| Melon Juice      |
| Lemon Grass Juice       |
| Chili Juice       |

| New Ingredients              |   
|---------------------|   
| Corn          |   
| Chili       |  
| Butter        | 
| Chili Butter       |
| Lemon Grass  |
#
